Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt race to find their missing dog Kota before it’s too late.
Video.title: Dog Missing! Search Begins

Video.summary: Salish hides from Jordan and Hudson in a chase all around LA to win a huge prize.
Video.title: I Hid From My Dad For 24 Hours

Image.alt: I Hid From My Dad For 24 Hours
I Hid From My Dad For 24 Hours
I Hid From My Dad For 24 Hours

Video.summary: The Ninja Family bundles up for a visit to an ice fort for a special family rendition of Freeze Tag.
Video.title: Freeze Tag

Video.summary: I surprised my best friend after he got into a terrible accident.
Video.title: My Best Friend's Accident

Video.summary: Salish attempts to survive 24 hours in a house with parents who have no rules.
Video.title: Survive Parents With No Rules

Video.summary: Payton and the family travel to Hollywood for a huge awards ceremony where Payton gets slimed!
Video.title: Payton on Stage

Video.summary: Rebecca secretly builds a hidden room for her new baby before telling Zadie.
Video.title: Building Secret Baby Room

Video.summary: Rebecca Zamolo competes as every win ages a cheerleader from 1 to 50 with crazy results.
Video.title: Win, Cheerleader Ages

Video.summary: Jazzy and Jack swap bodies for 24 hours. Will it strengthen their twin bond or trap them forever?
Video.title: Twin Body Swap

Video.summary: Jordan challenges Salish to complete her back-to-school morning routine in 30 minutes.
Video.title: School Morning Routine

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz must buy everything in one color without going over the budget.
Video.title: One Color Shopping Challenge

Video.summary: The Ninja Fam travel to Las Vegas to open a new Ninja Kidz Action Park location.
Video.title: We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ

Image.alt: We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ
We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ
We Broke into Spy Ninjas HQ

Video.summary: Payton and Paxton’s 15th birthday is an epic adventure with unbelievable surprises and excitement.
Video.title: Twin Surprise

Video.summary: Mean girls battle in a celebrity dress-to-impress challenge with everything on the line.
Video.title: Mean Girls Dress to Impress

Video.summary: Rebecca has a secret plan for a cheerleader room after the gym flooded.
Video.title: Secret Cheer Gym Room

Video.summary: Rebecca challenges girls and boys to a detention challenge with extreme punishments for the losing team.
Video.title: Girls vs. Boys Detention Challenge

Video.summary: Rebecca and Zadie taste 100 years of school lunches in one challenge.
Video.title: Eating 100 Years of School Lunches with Daughter

Image.alt: Eating 100 Years of School Lunches with Daughter
Eating 100 Years of School Lunches with Daughter
Eating 100 Years of School Lunches with Daughter

Video.summary: Rebecca transforms into a cheerleader to support her daughter’s dream in an emotional challenge.
Video.title: Mom Becomes Cheerleader!

Video.summary: Rebecca and Matt search for a new home for their growing family with only 24 hours to find it.
Video.title: Finding a New House in 24 Hours

Image.alt: Finding a New House in 24 Hours
Finding a New House in 24 Hours
Finding a New House in 24 Hours

Video.summary: The Ninja superheroes band together to defend the Earth from Deathstroke and his army of fear monsters.
Video.title: League of Ninjas

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz needs to enlist the Shaman Wizard's help to defeat the void army.
Video.title: Elemental Masters

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz their most popular gymnastics challenge video.
Video.title: Best Gymnast Rematch

Video.summary: The Ninja Kidz search for the most talented gymnast and qualify to the Ninja World Championship.
Video.title: Gymnastics Superstar

Video.summary: Bryton and Ashton build a secret room to hide from bounty hunters and WWE stars join Payton and Paxton.
Video.title: Secret Room Hunters

Video.summary: Jordan turns 14 & Salish becomes and adult for 24 hours. Chaos ensues!
Video.title: Parent and Kid Age Swap

Video.summary: Salish and her best friend Nidal have to survive every grade of school before they go to their first prom.
Video.title: Salish Survives Every Grade

Video.summary: Salish insists on flying solo, but Jordan can’t resist going undercover in an extreme disguise.
Video.title: Trampoline Park Secret Room

Video.summary: Salish and her brother try to bust 50 myths in 24 hours.
Video.title: Busting 50 Myths in 24 Hours

Video.summary: Salish and her dad Jordan compete in who can build the best dog house.
Video.title: Dream Dog House

Video.summary: Salish tries to build a secret room in school without getting caught.
Video.title: I Built a Secret Room in School

Image.alt: I Built a Secret Room in School
I Built a Secret Room in School
I Built a Secret Room in School

Video.summary: Salish attempts 5 funny challenges, gets a surprise gift, and finally gets her braces off!
Video.title: Salish New Teeth

Video.summary: Kade and his friend Nayeli become adults and try to be parents for 24 hours.
Video.title: Parents For 24 Hours

Video.summary: The Fun Squad vs. @TheKJARCrew in an ultimate Mermaids vs. Vampires one-color food challenge!
Video.title: Eating One Color for 24 Hours

Video.summary: Jazzy asks her best friend Shae to prom with a crazy scavenger hunt!
Video.title: I Asked my Best Friend to Prom!

Image.alt: I Asked my Best Friend to Prom!
I Asked my Best Friend to Prom!
I Asked my Best Friend to Prom!

Video.summary: Jazzy is surprised with a special first dance, including her friend flown in and fun dance challenges.
Video.title: Jazzy’s Homecoming Surprise

Video.summary: Kyler is left Home Alone and must protect the house, and the families Christmas decorations from the Grinch!
Video.title: Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!

Image.alt: Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!
Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!
Home Alone 2! Full Movie by The Fun Squad!

Video.summary: Bryton goes through a rough tonsil surgery and shows the real ups and downs of recovery.
Video.title: Can I Recover From Surgery?!

Video.summary: The Ninja Fam throw a puppy gender reveal party!
Video.title: Puppy Gender Reveal!

Video.summary: Nidal controls Salish, and she can't say no. Then, their followers take over their day at Disneyland!
Video.title: Control My Life

Video.summary: Nidal and Salish get ready for an emotional first school dance by tackling 5 mystery challenges.
Video.title: First Dance

Video.summary: Nidal and Salish test their relationship with a lie detector and by being stuck in a tiny room together.
Video.title: Relationship Test

Video.summary: Salish attempts 20 different jobs featuring Brent Rivera, Preston, Royalty Family.
Video.title: Trying New Jobs
